paymentContainers.label: Places & methods
paymentContainers.description: Where money lives and how it moves

paymentContainersPage.error: Failed to load payment places and methods. Please try again.
paymentContainersPage.title: Where your money lives and how it moves
paymentContainersPage.description: Manage where money is held (accounts, wallets, or cash) and how it moves (cards, transfers, or other methods).

containers.title: Places
containers.description: Active places appear as the source or destination in expenses and incomes.
containers.inactiveDescription: If you use one of these places again, reactivating it returns it to the primary forms.

instruments.title: Legacy methods
instruments.legacyDescription: Compatibility only for older data. New expenses and incomes use places.
instruments.description: Hidden by default because primary flows now use places.

form.title: Move money between places
form.description: Transfer ARS between active places without creating income or expenses.
form.needTwoPlaces: Create or reactivate at least two places to move money.

history.title: Transfer history
history.description: Recent money movements between places. Canceled transfers stay out of this active history.
history.correctionGuidance: Need to correct a wrong transfer? Cancel it, then create a new transfer with the right details.

validation.samePlace: Source and destination places must be different
validation.amountPositive: Amount must be greater than zero

container.description: Where money is held, such as a bank account, wallet, or cash.

instrument.description: How money moves, such as cards, transfers, or cash payments.
instrument.backingRequiredHelp: Required for debit and credit cards.
